title: Bhor Bhakti
desc: The host sheds light on the various customs and traditions followed by people across various states of India.

title: Paramavatar Shri Krishna
desc: Lord Krishna, once a naughty little child, grows up and embarks on a number of adventures to fight and eradicate evil forces and provide justice to all.

title: Kundali Bhagya
desc: Pragya Arora's long-lost sisters, Preeta and Srishti, plot their own course in fate's uncharted waters where adversities and good times go hand in hand.

title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile
desc: Raghav faces media questions and is struck by a rock during the encounter. Meanwhile, Reet discovers Poonam missing as she considers taking her own life.

title: Vasudha
desc: Karishma instructs Sarika to seat Devansh and Vasudha together at the Dosha Nivaran Puja. She then feigns a sprained ankle to further her hidden agenda.

title: Meet
desc: Meet Ahlawat, the intoxicated protagonist, erroneously perceives Tanya as Meet and bestows a kiss upon her. Furthermore, Meet Ahlawat subsequently resolves to disclose the entire veracity to Meet.

title: Meet
desc: Whether it be employment or an unexpected marriage to her namesake, the tomboyish and fun-loving Meet challenges social conventions and gender roles every step of the way.

title: Zindagi Ki Mehek
desc: Mahek, a talented and aspiring chef, enters a cooking competition to follow her passion. Her life takes an unexpected turn when she crosses paths with Shaurya, the arrogant judge of the competition.

title: Guddan Tumse Na Ho Payega
desc: Guddan reaches the Jindal house and does not find Revati, but Parv blackmails her to marry AJ in return for Revati's safety. Later, AJ sees Guddan disheartened and asks her the reason, but she lies.

title: Kumkum Bhagya
desc: Pragya and Abhi find their lives entwined in a cruel twist of fate. However, despite their initial aversion towards one another, they fall in love and fight to be together against all odds.

title: Jaane Anjaane Hum Mile
desc: Raghav learns Viren will be transferred to a larger prison. Meanwhile, Viren's mother visits him in jail and harms him to manipulate Poonam.

title: Vasudha
desc: Though they have different perspectives, the amiable and endearing Vasudha works as a housekeeper in Chandrika, a business tycoon's house.
